reviews.review_title: PandaVR pls work on the game
reviews.review_description: Hey panda I’ve been playing this game since you dropped it and uh I wanna know if your okay because I know people are asking why aren’t you updating the game or making it but you know some people have to work on stuff important in real life but can you pls work on the game I’ve been waiting for you to work on the game
it is the best horror game out there and has the best owner of all game owners there is not a single game owner that is better than panda

First of all your hands are just little red dots that make it hard to move around cause you don’t know the hitbox of them. Secondly there is no multiplayer no computer to type servers name or color nothing. Thirdly THERE ARE NO MONSTERS?! Last of all it looks like they just took all their time to make a map and to see who the mods are.(it’s just a worse version of big scary)
thank you.

reviews.review_description: I was trying to play with my little brothers and then panda (admin/creator) permanently banned me and my little brothers for no reason I don’t recommend buying it. It has a horrible community and everyone is toxic and try’s to get people banned. More: all I care about is my little brothers having that game so please unbanned them they love that game that’s all I ask

developer_response.body: Heres the reasons you got banned: IP Banned from brother (Underaged) Please In the new update you can Maybe get your banned Lifted.
